pr_title: fix(sprint): re-anchor writable_paths glob to session root
pr_body:
Closes #42.

## Summary
- Restore the `.ai/sprints/SPRINT-*.md` glob anchor to the tracker session root in `sprint/sprint_exec_yaml_v2.dip`.
- Add a smoke check to the existing tests/ harness that fails when the anchor is missing.

## Test plan
- [ ] `dippin check sprint/sprint_exec_yaml_v2.dip` clean
- [ ] `tracker validate` clean
- [ ] new bats case covers the anchor regression

changes.summary: Re-anchor the writable_paths glob on the RecoveryManager agent to the session-rooted path.
New regression test that asserts the anchored glob is present and resolves under the session root.

test_strategy: Add a bats regression test that greps for the anchored glob, plus rerun dippin check + tracker validate on the touched file.
